text:
miwi        2009-07-28 17:10:23 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/p5-Devel-LeakGuard-Object Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
                                    pkg-plist 
  Log:
  This module provides tracking of objects, for the purpose of detecting
  memory leaks due to circular references or innappropriate caching schemes.
  
  WWW:    http://search.cpan.org/dist/Devel-LeakGuard-Object/
  
  PR:             ports/136897
  Submitted by:   TERAMOTO Masahiro <markun at onohara.to>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.3570    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +26 -0     ports/devel/p5-Devel-LeakGuard-Object/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/devel/p5-Devel-LeakGuard-Object/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +4 -0      ports/devel/p5-Devel-LeakGuard-Object/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/p5-Devel-LeakGuard-Object/pkg-plist (new)
